overview: Magistral 1.2 (Small & Medium) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Magistral line. Released 2025-09-17. Chain-of-thought reasoning line in open Small and premier Medium sizes.
What's notable in this version: Adds image understanding; Small 1.2 fits on a laptop (magistral-small/medium-2509).
